subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, and the Command hath been made manifest with justice from God, the Lord of the worlds. Say: O peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و امر ظهر بالعدل من لدی الله رب العالمین قل یا ملأ الأرض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
